name: jaddress-web-application
description: J-address monorepo - Japanese mail forwarding service

scripts.dev: npm run dev:docker && concurrently "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.dev:docker: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const result = spawnSync('docker', ['info'], { stdio: 'ignore' }); if (result.status !== 0) { console.error('[dev] Docker daemon is not running or not reachable. Please start Docker and ensure docker-compose.yml exists before running \'npm run dev\'.'); process.exit(1); }" && docker compose up -d
